title: 151 Cartridge Refills - Bathroom & Kitchen Acrylic - White
features: WATERPROOF, QUICK & EASY TO USE: 151 Bathroom & Kitchen Sealant, mould resistant, suitable for filling cracks & gaps in kitchens and bathrooms.
DIY CARTRIDGE: 151 Bathroom & Kitchen Sealant, a white acrylic based sealant, fits standard DIY cartridge caulking guns.
PERMANENTLY FLEXIBLE SEALANT: 151 Bathroom & Kitchen Sealant, remains permanently flexible, suitable for indoor use.
CLEAN TO USE, EASY TO APPLY: Always ensure that the surface is smooth, clean, dry and free of moisture, grease and dust prior to applying.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT. Ready to use Bathroom & Kitchen Acrylic Sealant.Size: 310ml. Store at room temperature.
description: Product Description 151 Bathroom & Kitchen Sealant,. A white acrylic based sealant, which is mould resistant, remains permanently flexible. Suitable for indoor use. Fits standard DIY cartridge caulking guns, suitable for filling cracks & gaps in kitchens and bathrooms. Ready to use Bathroom & Kitchen Acrylic Sealant. Size: 310ml. Store at room temperature. Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Bathroom & Kitchen Sealant White 450g
